_note: Snappy color-follows-drag-state tint. Distinct from widget.tint (300ms general tint) and cursor.drag (cursor-position animations) — this profile is for color bindings that should react immediately to a drag/press toggle. Inherits duration/curve shape from cursor.drag (50ms, library-default curve) but carries widget-color semantics in its name.
name: widget.tintDrag
